summary: Adopt the accepted product recovery roadmap and create the minimal R0 task graph
acceptance_criteria: Record the product owner's explicit acceptance of docs/29-product-recovery-roadmap.md without rewriting historical M0-M6 Gate results.
Make docs/29 the authoritative forward product-maturity roadmap and reconcile docs/11 and docs/23 to the R0-R8 stage model.
Move the rejected M7 strategic terrain renderer task out of operational IN_PROGRESS state while preserving its partial diff and handoff evidence.
Create only the minimum dependency-ordered R0 tasks required by the accepted roadmap; do not create R1 implementation tasks yet.
Record the real current lead thread and mark the stale client_engineer record closed/not-found without deleting history.
Set current milestone to R0, keep Autonomous Goal Mode enabled, and record no active Human Gate after roadmap acceptance.
Do not modify product code, tests, content, dependencies, prior Gate documents, or accepted ADRs.
required_tests: pnpm exec prettier --check docs/11-roadmap.md docs/23-milestone-acceptance-matrix.md docs/29-product-recovery-roadmap.md project/tasks/active/RR0-*.json
node -e parse all changed JSON files
node -e semantic assertion for goal/model current R0 task, active lead, downstream DRAFT tasks, and non-active M7 renderer drift
git diff --name-only check proving no forbidden paths changed
notes: This is a process and roadmap adoption task, not a product implementation task.
The current dirty M7 renderer work remains preserved in the original workspace and must not be copied into this worktree.
R0 task creation must keep writer scopes disjoint and reserve an independent reviewer slot.
R0 task graph created with exactly four downstream RR0 tasks and no R1 implementation tasks.
M7 strategic terrain renderer interaction is retained as non-active evidence rather than operational work.
Old client_engineer thread 019f1f02-6d7b-72a0-86db-8945be6b0606 is recorded as stale/not-found/closed based on real close_agent not_found result.
approval_source: Product owner message on 2026-07-10: 可以，接受。
next_action: Route roadmap adoption and minimal R0 task graph creation to systems_architect, then independent qa_reviewer.

acceptance_evidence.roadmap_status: docs/29-product-recovery-roadmap.md is accepted as forward product maturity roadmap
acceptance_evidence.current_status_snapshot: PROJECT_STATUS.md top R0 snapshot added; old material marked historical ledger
